name: PG&E Corporation
description: PG&E Corporation is a holding company headquartered in Oakland, California, primarily operating through its subsidiary, Pacific Gas and Electric Company. It is one of the largest combined natural gas and electric energy companies in the United States, providing essential utility services to approximately 16 million people across a 70,000-square-mile service area in northern and central California. The corporation focuses on delivering safe, reliable, and affordable energy while investing in a clean energy future, grid modernization, and comprehensive wildfire safety programs to support the communities it serves throughout the region.
